why_it_matters: Helps Jake talk in network terms, not software terms.
how_to_find_it: Map major Danone plants/DCs tied to yogurt, dairy, beverage, and inbound yard complexity using company site + public logistics news.

why_it_matters: Best outreach references a current ops, capacity, automation, service, or cost initiative.
how_to_find_it: Check earnings calls, press releases, LinkedIn posts, and trade coverage from last 12 months.

why_it_matters: Knowing if they use YMS/TMS/WMS/appointment tools sharpens the wedge.
how_to_find_it: Look for job posts, partner case studies, conference talks, and implementation resumes mentioning SAP, Oracle, Blue Yonder, Manhattan, project44, FourKites, etc.

why_it_matters: Plant / DC leaders often convert faster than HQ strategy people.
how_to_find_it: Find plant managers, DC GMs, logistics directors, transportation leads, and campus ops leaders in target metros.

why_it_matters: Proof of detention, congestion, gate friction, or paper BOL pain makes the story land.
how_to_find_it: Search public reviews, case studies, freight forums, and carrier comments for delays, check-in issues, or appointment pain.

why_it_matters: Official MODEX presence can be used in subject lines and ask framing.
how_to_find_it: Work named speakers plus supply chain org in Atlanta before and during show.

why_it_matters: These may be ecosystem routes, not first-best direct deals.
how_to_find_it: Document who could intro or refer Jake into shipper accounts.
